name: Birmingham Athletics Track (Alexander Stadium)
metaTitle: Alexander Stadium Birmingham | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and track information for the world-renowned Alexander Stadium in Birmingham.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Mon–Fri 06:30–21:00, Sat–Sun 08:00–17:00. Please note that the stadium is a major competition venue and may be closed for events.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access is managed via memberships and club sessions. Contact the stadium for current casual hire and track use rates.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A world-class Class 1 venue featuring a 9-lane international track and a separate 6-lane community track.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: On-site parking is available. Arrangements may vary during major sporting events or competitions.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Walsall Road, Perry Barr, Birmingham, B42 2LR

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Alexander Stadium website for facility hire information and event bookings.
